## Meeting Purpose

[Panel interview and sales role play with Kyle Rios-Merwin for Account Executive position at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/ncNzzqK3pJU2sabTkTXkYMJxs-uvoFSq?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Kyle demonstrated strong preparation and product knowledge, creating a detailed pitch deck and discovery process based solely on GrowthX's website](https://fathom.video/share/ncNzzqK3pJU2sabTkTXkYMJxs-uvoFSq?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [The role play focused on GrowthX's AI-powered content creation services, with Kyle pitching to a fictional Apollo.io team](https://fathom.video/share/ncNzzqK3pJU2sabTkTXkYMJxs-uvoFSq?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Feedback highlighted areas for improvement: shorter discovery, more pointed questions, and less reliance on slides for expert-level conversations](https://fathom.video/share/ncNzzqK3pJU2sabTkTXkYMJxs-uvoFSq?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)

## Topics

### Role Play Setup

  - [Kyle pitched GrowthX services to a fictional Apollo.io team (Kyle G as VP Growth, Jason as Content Lead, Bridget as CFO)](https://fathom.video/share/ncNzzqK3pJU2sabTkTXkYMJxs-uvoFSq?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
  - [Scenario: Apollo looking to expand content and AI capabilities as they transition to enterprise-level company](https://fathom.video/share/ncNzzqK3pJU2sabTkTXkYMJxs-uvoFSq?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Kyle created detailed context and pitch deck based solely on GrowthX website information](https://fathom.video/share/ncNzzqK3pJU2sabTkTXkYMJxs-uvoFSq?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Discovery Process

  - [Kyle conducted thorough discovery, asking about current challenges, urgency, and existing solutions](https://fathom.video/share/ncNzzqK3pJU2sabTkTXkYMJxs-uvoFSq?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [Identified key pain points: scaling content production, maintaining quality, increasing velocity, and operationalizing AI](https://fathom.video/share/ncNzzqK3pJU2sabTkTXkYMJxs-uvoFSq?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Slightly long discovery phase noted in feedback, suggestion to speed up based on prospect reactions](https://fathom.video/share/ncNzzqK3pJU2sabTkTXkYMJxs-uvoFSq?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)

### GrowthX Value Proposition

  - [Presented GrowthX as expert-led, AI-powered growth solution combining services and software](https://fathom.video/share/ncNzzqK3pJU2sabTkTXkYMJxs-uvoFSq?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)
  - [Highlighted differentiators: scalable content production, expert execution, fast implementation, and always-current technology](https://fathom.video/share/ncNzzqK3pJU2sabTkTXkYMJxs-uvoFSq?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
  - [Showcased case studies (DeepGram, Ramp, Reddit) demonstrating significant improvements in organic growth, content output, and velocity](https://fathom.video/share/ncNzzqK3pJU2sabTkTXkYMJxs-uvoFSq?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)

### Pricing and Next Steps

  - [Transparent pricing model: $20k one-time strategy sprint, $12k-$60k monthly for AI growth engine](https://fathom.video/share/ncNzzqK3pJU2sabTkTXkYMJxs-uvoFSq?tab=summary&timestamp=2024.0)
  - [Emphasized quick ROI timeline (8 weeks) and fully managed solution](https://fathom.video/share/ncNzzqK3pJU2sabTkTXkYMJxs-uvoFSq?tab=summary&timestamp=2117.0)
  - [Created urgency with limited onboarding slots and potential September 1st start date](https://fathom.video/share/ncNzzqK3pJU2sabTkTXkYMJxs-uvoFSq?tab=summary&timestamp=2225.0)

### Feedback and Areas for Improvement

  - [Reduce reliance on slides, especially for executive-level conversations](https://fathom.video/share/ncNzzqK3pJU2sabTkTXkYMJxs-uvoFSq?tab=summary&timestamp=2561.0)
  - [Prepare more pointed questions to guide prospects to desired conclusions](https://fathom.video/share/ncNzzqK3pJU2sabTkTXkYMJxs-uvoFSq?tab=summary&timestamp=2707.0)
  - [Improve deflection techniques for questions outside immediate expertise](https://fathom.video/share/ncNzzqK3pJU2sabTkTXkYMJxs-uvoFSq?tab=summary&timestamp=2431.0)
  - [Consider challenging prospect assumptions more directly](https://fathom.video/share/ncNzzqK3pJU2sabTkTXkYMJxs-uvoFSq?tab=summary&timestamp=2527.0)
  - [Balance between casual consultative approach and traditional sales tactics](https://fathom.video/share/ncNzzqK3pJU2sabTkTXkYMJxs-uvoFSq?tab=summary&timestamp=2539.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to review GrowthX's actual discovery deck and process](https://fathom.video/share/ncNzzqK3pJU2sabTkTXkYMJxs-uvoFSq?tab=summary&timestamp=2691.0)
  - [GrowthX team to consider improvements to website content and sales materials based on role play insights](https://fathom.video/share/ncNzzqK3pJU2sabTkTXkYMJxs-uvoFSq?tab=summary&timestamp=2822.0)
  - [Explore ways to better educate prospects on GrowthX's unique approach and differentiation in the market](https://fathom.video/share/ncNzzqK3pJU2sabTkTXkYMJxs-uvoFSq?tab=summary&timestamp=2828.0)
